emails.subject: Missing GTC's
emails.body: Missing GTC's Mark, I notice that we have GTC's for EGLI Liquids(without collateral) and ELFI Crude-Products-Petchems (without collateral), but we do not have GTC's for EGLI Liquids (with collateral) or ELFI Crude-Products-Petchems (with collateral). Is this correct? Please let me know your thoughts. Thanks! Frank x37235

emails.subject: Missing GTC's
emails.body: Missing GTC's Mark, I notice that we have GTC's for EGLI Liquids(without collateral) and ELFI Crude-Products-Petchems (without collateral), but we do not have GTC's for EGLI Liquids (with collateral) or ELFI Crude-Products-Petchems (with collateral). Is this correct? Please let me know your thoughts. Thanks! Frank x37235

emails.subject: Re: Missing GTC's
emails.body: Re: Missing GTC's Frank I think Harry Collins is tracking this down. If it isn't settled to your satisfaction by Thursday, please let me know. Mark Frank L Davis 09/20/99 04:23 PM
